stripMembersOptionality2.ts(4,29): error TS2322: Type 'undefined' is not assignable to type 'string'.
stripMembersOptionality2.ts(6,27): error TS2322: Type 'undefined' is not assignable to type 'string'.


==== stripMembersOptionality2.ts (2 errors) ====
    // https://github.com/microsoft/TypeScript/issues/63291
    
    type WithObject1 = Required<{ a?: string | undefined }>;
    const obj1: WithObject1 = { a: undefined };
                                ~
!!! error TS2322: Type 'undefined' is not assignable to type 'string'.
!!! related TS6500 stripMembersOptionality2.ts:3:31: The expected type comes from property 'a' which is declared here on type 'Required<{ a?: string | undefined; }>'
    type WithArray1 = Required<[(string | undefined)?]>;
    const tup1: WithArray1 = [undefined];
                              ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2322: Type 'undefined' is not assignable to type 'string'.
